scripts.generate:api: uv run --directory backend python ../scripts/export-openapi.py && pnpm --filter @serino/api-client run generate:api
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:frontend && pnpm run typecheck:admin && pnpm run typecheck:packages
scripts.lint:backend: uv run --directory backend ruff check src/ tests/ && uv run --directory backend ruff format --check src/ tests/
scripts.lint: pnpm run lint:workspace && pnpm run lint:backend && pnpm run lint:boundaries
scripts.test: pnpm run test:backend && pnpm run test:workspace
scripts.check: pnpm run check:secrets && pnpm run generate:api && pnpm run verify:generated:api-client && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build:frontend && pnpm run build:admin
